Welcome to CarBase.my!

Deciding on which car to buy is now made easy with CarBase.my! Make the right decision with our detailed specs, expert and user reviews and more. We are updating our database on a daily basis. If you spot an error or notice missing information, please let us know here. You can also view our FAQ here.

    on price, body
    type and more!
  • Compare cars
    within your
    selection!
  • Make a well
    informed
    decision!

Compare Print Honda WR-V S (2023)
Last updated on  13 Jul 2023| Report an Error

Looking to buy a new Honda WR-V (2023) S in Malaysia? Research Honda WR-V (2023) S car prices, specs, safety, reviews & ratings at CarBase.my. You can also compare the Honda WR-V (2023) S against its rivals in Malaysia.

Price

Peninsular RM 89,900.00 Langkawi -
Sabah - Labuan -
Sarawak -

Annual Costs

Insurance
RM 2,616.90
Road Tax
RM 120.00

Warranty

Warranty Manufacturer 5 years
Warranty Extended -
Notes Free Labour for Five Times within 100,000 km or Five Years

Colours - Exterior

Crystal Black Pearl
Ignite Red Metallic
Meteoroid Gray Metallic
Platinum White Pearl
Stellar Diamond Pearl

Specifications

Powertrain
Engine Tech 16-valve DOHC, naturally-aspirated with variable valve timing
Capacity 1,498 cc Horsepower 121 hp at 6,600 rpm
Arrangement Inline 4 4 Torque 145 Nm at 4,300 rpm
Timing Type Chain Fuel Petrol
Bore x Stroke 73 mm x 89.5 mm Compression Ratio 10.6:1
Drivetrain
Type CVT Automatic Transmission Name CVT
Ratios - Manufacturer -
Driveline Front Wheel Drive
Performance And Efficiency
0-100 km/h 11.0 seconds Rated Economy 6.0 L/100 km
Top Speed 160 km/h Co2 -
Dimensions
Length 4,060 mm Doors 5
Width 1,780 mm Seats 5
Height 1,576 mm Boot Space 380 litres
Wheelbase 2,485 mm Fuel Tank 40 litres
Weight 1,108 kg Tyre Front 215/60R16
Spare Tyre 16" Space Saver Tyre Rear 215/55R17
Factory Tyres -
Chassis
Type Unibody Assembly Malaysia
Front Suspension MacPherson Strut Rear Suspension Torsion Beam
Front Wheels 16" Alloy Rear Wheels 16" Alloy
Front Brakes Ventilated Disc Rear Brakes Drum
Steering Rack and Pinion (Electric Power Steering)
Chassis Notes -
Crash Safety Ratings
EuroNCAP Not Tested
ANCAP Not Tested
ASEAN NCAP Not Tested
Safety
Airbags 4 (Driver and Passenger, Front Side)
ABS/EBD Stability Control
Alarm Immobilizer
Airbag Disable Function Child Safety Lock Manual for Rear Doors
Seat Belts 5 Three-point Blind Spot Info System
ISOFIX Available on 2 Outer Rear Seats
Autonomous Braking System Yes, Honda Sensing
Lane-keeping Assist Steering Correction Collision Warning
Seatbelt Reminder All Seats Night Vision -
Safety Notes -
Lighting
Headlamps Halogen Reflector
Taillamps LED Combination
Front Foglamps LED Daytime Running Lights
Rear Foglamps Wing Mirror Turn Indicators
Cabin
Seats Front Manual Adjustable
Seats Rear -
Front Air-con Manual Air-con Sunroof
Rear Air-con - Power Sockets 1 Front, 1 Rear
Interior Lighting - Cupholders -
Sunshades -
Audio 7.0" Display Audio Touchscreen with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, 2 Speakers
Convenience
Power Windows -
Auto Start/Stop Cruise Control -
Engine Start - Tiptronic
Hill Start Assist Paddle Shift
Auto Headlamps Steering Audio Control
Auto Wipers Steering Tilt
Bluetooth Steering Telescopic
Navigation Electric Steering Adjustment
Parking Sensor Front - Head-up Display
Parking Sensor Rear 2 Sensors Locks Keyless Operation
Reverse Camera Yes, with Multi-angle Auto Parking -
Power Door - Folding Wing Mirrors
Boot Operation Manual Operation Instrument Cluster Backlit Analogue

About Us

CarBase.my is a one-stop car buyer's guide run by the paultan.org Automotive Network, with an extensive database of new cars on sale in Malaysia. You’ll find prices, specifications, warranty details, high-resolution photos, expert and user reviews, and so much more – packaged in a user-friendly, intuitive layout that is easy to read.

Stay up to date with CarBase.my by following us at:
